Short answer: 

- **By current market value:** **PROP-0001 — Land near river** — **$1.45M** (valuation May 2026). [View Property](/property/PROP-0001)  
- **By purchase price:** **PROP-0011 — BKK1 Prime Land** — **$1.45M** (purchase price). [View Property](/property/PROP-0011)

They’re effectively tied (one by market value, one by purchase price). Want a full ranking of top properties by market value or purchase price? How can I help you with your portfolio today?
